creator: franco@opnsense.org
text:
Created attachment 253658
OpenBSD dhcrelay

Hi,

Since ISC is EOL we have been looking for a capable alternative and introduced the OpenBSD dhcrelay(6) daemons to OPNsense and they behave well after a number of porting difficulties.

This is being actively maintained although I doubt there will be much changes to the code in general.


Cheers,
Franco
